description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and look stylish effortlessly in this pair of red and grey striped socks from quiksilver. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this pair offers exemplary comfort. Made of 80% cotton, 18% polyamide and 2% elastaneHas a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorptionInner arch support for a secure and stable fitBranding printed below the ribbed mouthCareMachine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean
